原文摘要: Codex CLI is a lightweight coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally, helping developers read, edit, test, and refactor code from the terminal.
Agentic coding tool that lives in the terminal, IDE, and GitHub workflow, helping developers understand codebases and automate routine coding tasks.
Official OpenAI Agents SDK for building multi-agent workflows with tools, handoffs, guardrails, tracing, and model-provider flexibility.
JavaScript and TypeScript version of the OpenAI Agents SDK, designed for building agentic workflows in web and Node.js applications.
Google Agent Development Kit, a code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents.
Low-level orchestration framework for building long-running, stateful, controllable language agents with durable execution and human-in-the-loop workflows.
Agent engineering platform for building LLM-powered applications with interoperable components, model integrations, tools, retrieval, and agent abstractions.
Collection of reference and community-built MCP servers that connect LLM applications to external tools, data sources, and services.
Official TypeScript SDK for building Model Context Protocol servers and clients, widely used by AI tools and IDE integrations.
Official GitHub MCP Server that lets AI agents read repositories, manage issues and pull requests, analyze code, and automate GitHub workflows.
Makes websites accessible for AI agents, enabling browser automation with Playwright and LLM-driven task execution.
Open-source LLM-friendly web crawler that turns web pages into clean Markdown for RAG, agents, and data pipelines.
Lightweight Python utility for converting files and Office documents into Markdown for LLM, RAG, and text analysis pipelines.
Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development, combining visual workflows, RAG pipelines, agent capabilities, model management, and LLMOps.
Open-source RAG engine with deep document understanding, converged context engine, and agent templates for enterprise knowledge workflows.
Framework for building temporal knowledge graphs for AI agents, tracking facts, provenance, and changing context over time.
End-to-end TypeScript AI agent engineering platform with memory, RAG, tools, MCP, workflows, voice, guardrails, observability, and deployment support.
Microsoft's multi-agent AI framework for building autonomous or human-collaborative agent applications, now a mature reference point in the agent ecosystem.
Open-source tool for testing prompts, models, RAG pipelines, and agent behaviors, helping teams catch regressions and evaluate LLM quality.
Run open-source LLMs locally with a simple developer experience, widely used as the local model runtime behind personal agents and RAG applications.
